## About This README

This repository is part of the observed input state and may appear in derived aggregates when present in repos.nix.
The generator repository is currently included in the observed state as [akazdayo](https://github.com/akazdayo/akazdayo).
Static identity, contact destinations, summary cards, retained detail blocks, and the footnote stay declarative in `nix/profile/static.nix`, while repository-derived lists come from `nix/profile/aggregate.nix`.
